description: Create or update a record for a given model identified by its unique by
label: Upsert Record

options.name: model
options.label: Model
options.info: The model you want to upsert a record for.

options.name: mapping
options.label: Value Mapping
options.info: Mapping of values to properties for the upserted record. The properties are based on the model from the selected record.
Select a property where you want to match the record to check if it already exists. If the record exists, it will be updated. If it doesn't exist, it will be created.
options.name: uniqueBy
options.label: Unique By property to check for existing record

options.name: as
options.label: As
options.info: The name of the variable you want for the upserted record.

options.name: validates
options.label: Validates
options.info: Apply validations when upserting the record.
